name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Fixed

- ManageGameObject SetComponentProperty now handles Unity object references more reliably, including objectIdString, asset path/GUID, {guid,fileID,type} subassets, and {find,component} scene component payloads.
- TextMeshPro font assignment now syncs m_fontAsset, m_sharedMaterial, font/fontSharedMaterial, and renderer shared material when a matching TMP material can be resolved, and responses include before/after font/material evidence.
- MeshRenderer sharedMaterial/sharedMaterials now accept material reference payloads directly and return actionable errors instead of misleading property-not-found messages.
- ManageUI SetGraphic can update world-space TMPro.TextMeshPro font/material/color targets and reports the resulting TMP font/material state.
- BatchActions ValidateScript now supports read-only validation of scripts under both Assets/... and Packages/....

### Previous Changes

- RuntimeStateProbe and RuntimeProfiler read-only sampling now honor MCP/client cancellation and scheduler timeouts.
- UniBridge_ExecutionStatus adds Action=ReapStale to cancel and release stale read-only scheduler operations.
- Added Tools~/McpSmokeRegression/Run-McpSmokeRegression.ps1, a repeatable MCP stdio smoke regression runner for live Unity projects.
